overview: A production-ready AI-powered misinformation detection dashboard with real-time text, image, and video analysis. Features credibility scoring, emotional manipulation meters, deepfake detection, and an education mode — all in a dark-mode, visually striking interface with Hindi/English support.
features: Real AI text analysis with credibility scores and misleading phrase highlighting
Emotional Manipulation Meter (0-100) with animated gauge
ELI15 plain-language explanations of analysis verdicts
Image deepfake detection and authenticity scoring with upload support
Video analysis with edit detection and summary verdicts
Interactive education mode on misinformation types, clickbait, and emotional manipulation
Dark mode dashboard with animated charts, gauges, and classification badges
